---
title: "Clustering Methods"
---

This page introduces the k-means clustering problem and the different algorithmic approaches provided by this library.

## The K-Means Problem

Explanation of the k-means objective function in a general metric space.

## Algorithms

This library provides two main algorithms to solve the k-means problem:

- **[Lloyd's Algorithm](lloyd.md):** A classic iterative approach.
- **[Simulated Annealing](simulated-annealing.md):** A more robust method based on stochastic optimization.
